title: Rich Set Modal + Set Store/Load/Activate
description: When a PerformanceSet notification View Details action is triggered, shows a rich modal with: animated waveform snippet canvas per track section, energy curve overlay, track structure diagram, set item timeline. Full set store/load/activate workflow end-to-end.

stories.title: SetDetailModal LiveComponent
stories.description: New LiveComponent showing PerformanceSet details. Header: set name, source badge, track title. Left panel: animated canvas with energy curve waveform snippet (reuses AnalysisEnergyCurve hook data). Right panel: item timeline showing cue points/loops as colored blocks on a horizontal time axis. Footer: Activate button, Export MIDI, Save to Library.
acceptance_criteria: Modal opens from notification View Details action
Waveform snippet canvas renders a 10s clip around the first set item
Energy curve overlaid on waveform as animated gradient fill
Set item timeline shows all cue/loop points as colored blocks
Activate button loads the set into the active DJ deck
Modal closes on Escape or backdrop click

stories.title: SetPreviewCanvas JS hook
stories.description: Canvas hook that renders: (1) waveform PCM snippet using Web Audio AnalyserNode or pre-computed peaks from analysis data, (2) energy curve as animated glowing line using requestAnimationFrame, (3) set item markers as vertical colored lines with labels. Reuses analysis_energy_curve data format from existing AnalysisEnergyCurve hook.
acceptance_criteria: Canvas renders in < 100ms for typical set size
Energy curve animates smoothly at 60fps
Set item markers clickable — triggers seek in any active preview
Responsive: canvas width follows container
Works without audio loaded (renders from analysis data only)

stories.title: Set Library panel in DJ tab
stories.description: Add a 'My Sets' collapsible panel in the DJ tab sidebar. Lists all PerformanceSets for the current track. Each row shows: set name, source badge (Chef/Manual), item count, created_at. Actions: Load (populates the set into the DJ editor), Activate (immediate deck load), Delete.
acceptance_criteria: My Sets panel shows all PerformanceSets for current track
Load action populates set items into DJ cue editor
Activate action triggers deck load immediately
Delete with confirmation removes the set
Sets sorted by most recently created

stories.title: Manual set save from DJ editor
stories.description: Add Save as Set button to the DJ tab hot cue editor toolbar. Creates a PerformanceSet from the current manual cue points / loop regions with source: :manual. Shows inline name input before save.
acceptance_criteria: Save as Set button visible in DJ editor toolbar
Inline name input appears on click
Confirm creates PerformanceSet with source :manual
Saved set immediately appears in My Sets panel
